offer: For bookkeepers managing 10–50 clients using QuickBooks, manual reconciliation causes late financial reporting. We automate transaction matching instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem: Discrepancies between bank transactions and accounting records
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for bookkeeping help
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to bookkeepers with demo video
Community forums for bookkeeping tools sharing
try_it: Let users try manual transaction entry and discrepancy flagging on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
